q.en: Where does Zarela find the WeatherBot machine?
q.zh: 扎雷拉(Zarela)是在哪里发现气象机器人(WeatherBot)的？

options.en: On the football field
options.zh: 在橄榄球场上

options.en: In her mother's science classroom according to some versions of the story in an early draft of the book
options.zh: 在妈妈的科学教室里（按书中另一种说法）（在书的早期草稿中）

options.en: In a school basement storage room, under a tarp covering a large machine
options.zh: 在学校地下室的储物间里，盖着防水布的一台大机器下面

options.en: In Missy's backyard
options.zh: 在米西家的后院

explain.en: While hiding during a game of hide-and-seek, Zarela 'crept to the back of the room and ducked under a tarp that was covering a large machine,' where she saw the word WeatherBot.
explain.zh: 捉迷藏时，扎雷拉「蹑手蹑脚走到房间尽头，钻到盖着一台大机器的防水布下」，在那里看到了 WeatherBot 的字样。

q.en: According to the notes, what buttons and switch start a rainstorm?
q.zh: 根据笔记，按哪些按钮、拨哪个开关会「启动」一场雨？

options.en: Just shout 'rain' three times
options.zh: 只要连喊三声「下雨」

options.en: Flip the bottom switch, then the red button, then the green button according to some versions of the story
options.zh: 先拨底部开关，再按红色、再按绿色（按书中另一种说法）

options.en: Push the green button, then the red button, then flip the bottom switch
options.zh: 先按绿色按钮，再按红色按钮，然后拨动底部开关

options.en: Push the red button, then the green button, then the top switch
options.zh: 先按红色、再按绿色，然后拨顶部开关

explain.en: The clipboard notes read, 'To initiate a rainstorm, push the green button, then the red button, then flip the bottom switch.' Zarela follows exactly this order.
explain.zh: 机器上的笔记写着：「要启动一场雨，先按绿色按钮，再按红色按钮，然后拨动底部开关。」扎雷拉正是照这个顺序操作的。

q.en: How do you stop a rainstorm, according to the notes Zarela reads at halftime?
q.zh: 根据扎雷拉在中场时读到的笔记，要怎样「停止」一场雨？

options.en: Reverse the sequence: bottom switch, red button, then green button
options.zh: 把顺序反过来：先底部开关，再红色按钮，然后绿色按钮

options.en: Wait for the battery to run out
options.zh: 等电池耗尽

options.en: Unplug the machine from the wall
options.zh: 把机器从墙上拔掉插头

options.en: Push the green and red buttons again according to some versions of the story
options.zh: 再按一次绿色和红色按钮（按书中另一种说法）

explain.en: The notes say, 'To halt a rainstorm, reverse the sequence: bottom switch, red button, and green button.' Zarela does this and the rain stops.
explain.zh: 笔记说：「要停止一场雨，把顺序反过来：底部开关、红色按钮、绿色按钮。」扎雷拉照做，雨就停了。

q.en: In the glossary, what does the word 'initiate' mean?
q.zh: 在词汇表里，「initiate」是什么意思？

options.en: To repair a machine
options.zh: 修理一台机器

options.en: To begin or start
options.zh: 开始、启动

options.en: To hide under a tarp
options.zh: 钻到防水布下面

options.en: To finish or end
options.zh: 结束、终止

explain.en: The glossary defines 'initiate' as 'to begin or start' — the notes use it as 'To initiate a rainstorm' (p. 4).
explain.zh: 词汇表把 initiate 定义为「开始、启动」——笔记里写作「要启动(initiate)一场雨」（第4页）。

q.en: In the glossary, what is a 'forecast'?

options.en: A type of soccer game
options.zh: 一种足球比赛

options.en: A prediction of expected weather conditions
options.zh: 对预期天气情况所做的预测

options.en: A kind of popcorn
options.zh: 一种爆米花

options.en: A machine that makes rain according to some versions of the story
options.zh: 一台会造雨的机器（按书中另一种说法）

explain.en: The glossary defines 'forecast' as 'a prediction of expected weather conditions' — Missy notes the weather forecast 'called for blue skies,' but it rained instead.
explain.zh: 词汇表把 forecast 定义为「对预期天气情况所做的预测」——米西说天气预报「说是大晴天」，结果却下了雨。

q.en: What happened the one time Mom used her own weather machine in college?
q.zh: 妈妈大学时用自己的气象机器那一次，发生了什么？

options.en: It snowed in the middle of summer
options.zh: 盛夏里下起了雪

options.en: The college was struck by lightning fifty times in one night, and a strange fog surrounded it for years
options.zh: 那所大学一晚被闪电击中五十次，之后被怪雾笼罩了好多年

options.en: Everyone at college got perfect grades according to some versions of the story in an early draft of the book
options.zh: 大学里所有人都拿到了满分（按书中另一种说法）（在书的早期草稿中）

options.en: The machine caught on fire harmlessly
options.zh: 机器无害地起火了

explain.en: Mom says, 'The one time I used it, the college was struck by lightning fifty times in one night. For years afterward, the college was surrounded by a strange fog.'
explain.zh: 妈妈说：「我唯一那次用它，大学一晚被闪电击中五十次。之后好多年，学校都被怪雾笼罩着。」

q.en: After Zarela stops the rain, what warning does she find written on the back of the notes?
q.zh: 扎雷拉把雨停下后，在笔记背面发现了什么警告？

options.en: Always push the green button first
options.zh: 一定要先按绿色按钮

options.en: Tell your mother before using the machine according to some versions of the story
options.zh: 用机器前要先告诉妈妈（按书中另一种说法）

options.en: The machine is safe to use anytime
options.zh: 这台机器任何时候都能安全使用

options.en: Attempts to undo previous weather manipulation may cause unstable results
options.zh: 试图撤销先前的天气操纵，可能导致不稳定的后果

explain.en: On the back page her mother wrote, 'Warning: Attempts to undo previous weather manipulation may cause unstable results' — which is why stopping the rain makes it snow in September.
explain.zh: 妈妈在背面写道：「警告：试图撤销先前的天气操纵，可能导致不稳定的后果」——所以停雨后九月竟下起了雪。

q.en: What final message does the book leave the reader with about science and nature?
q.zh: 关于科学与自然，这本书最后留给读者什么信息？

options.en: Fog is the best kind of weather
options.zh: 雾是最好的天气

options.en: Scientists should build more weather machines according to some versions of the story
options.zh: 科学家应该造更多气象机器（按书中另一种说法）

options.en: Lightning is fun to collect
options.zh: 收集闪电很好玩

options.en: There are some things we just shouldn't mess with
options.zh: 有些事情我们就是不该去乱碰

explain.en: Both Mom ('Maybe there are some things science just shouldn't mess with') and Zarela ('Let's not invent any more weather machines. There are some things we just shouldn't mess with') state this warning.
explain.zh: 妈妈（「也许有些事情科学就是不该去乱碰」）和扎雷拉（「我们别再造气象机器了。有些事情我们就是不该去乱碰」）都点明了这个警告。

q.en: Besides the danger of the machine, what does the story teach about honesty and family?
q.zh: 除了机器的危险，这个故事还教了我们关于诚实与家庭的什么？

options.en: You should talk to a parent you trust instead of hiding a mistake — 'I'm your mother; I want to help you'
options.zh: 应该向信任的父母坦白，而不是隐瞒错误——「我是你妈妈，我想帮你」

options.en: Parents should never help with science projects
options.zh: 父母绝不该帮科学作业

options.en: Lying always solves the problem
options.zh: 说谎总能解决问题

options.en: It is fine to never tell your parents anything according to some versions of the story in an early draft of the book
options.zh: 永远不告诉父母任何事也没关系（按书中另一种说法）（在书的早期草稿中）

explain.en: After Zarela confesses, Mom says, 'Zarela, you can always talk to me. I'm your mother — I want to help you,' and Zarela agrees she 'should have told you as soon as the machine turned on.'
explain.zh: 扎雷拉坦白后，妈妈说：「扎雷拉，你随时都可以跟我说。我是你妈妈——我想帮你。」扎雷拉也承认自己「机器一启动就该告诉你」。

q.en: Why do Zarela and her mom decide they must destroy the WeatherBot?
q.zh: 为什么扎雷拉和妈妈决定必须毁掉气象机器人？

options.en: Because it is too dangerous and 'It's the only way' to stop the weather chaos it causes
options.zh: 因为它太危险了，「这是唯一的办法」来终结它造成的天气混乱

options.en: Because they wanted to build a bigger one according to some versions of the story in an early draft of the book
options.zh: 因为他们想造一台更大的（按书中另一种说法）（在书的早期草稿中）

options.en: Because it was too old and rusty
options.zh: 因为它太旧、生锈了

options.en: Because the school asked them to
options.zh: 因为学校要求他们这么做

explain.en: Looking at the snow and fog, Mom says, 'We have to destroy the machine. It's the only way,' and together they cut the wires and remove the circuit board so it can never work again.
explain.zh: 看着雪和雾，妈妈说：「我们必须毁掉这台机器。这是唯一的办法。」于是两人一起剪断电线、拆掉电路板，让它再也不能运行。

prompt.en: Zarela used a machine she didn't understand, then tried to fix the mess alone before finally telling her mom. Think of a time you did something without asking, or hid a mistake because you were afraid. What happened, and what did you learn about asking for help? Do you agree with the book's warning that 'there are some things we just shouldn't mess with'?
prompt.zh: 扎雷拉用了一台自己不懂的机器，然后想独自收拾烂摊子，最后才告诉妈妈。回想一次你没先询问就做了某事、或因为害怕而隐瞒错误的经历。结果怎样？你从「开口求助」中学到了什么？你同不同意书里的警告——「有些事情我们就是不该去乱碰」？

en: Zarela pushed the buttons 'even though [she] didn't think the WeatherBot worked' and caused rain (p. 7).
She tried to fix it alone at halftime, which turned the rain into September snow (p. 10-11).
Mom's lesson: 'you can always talk to me... I want to help you,' and 'there are some things we just shouldn't mess with' (p. 13).
A good answer connects a personal mistake to the value of asking for help before trouble grows.
zh: 扎雷拉按了按钮，「虽然她本来觉得气象机器人根本不工作」，却造成了雨（第7页）。
她中场想独自修复，结果雨变成了九月的雪（第10-11页）。
妈妈的教训：「你随时都可以跟我说……我想帮你」，以及「有些事情我们就是不该去乱碰」（第13页）。
好的回答要把一次个人失误，与「在麻烦变大前求助」的价值联系起来。
